tools.name: search_users
tools.description: Search Entra ID users by display name, email, or UPN. Returns matching users with key attributes.

query.description: Free-text term matched against displayName, mail, or userPrincipalName.

filter.description: Optional OData $filter (used instead of free-text search when provided).

select.description: Optional list of user properties to return.

top.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 10).

tools.name: get_user_details
tools.description: Get a comprehensive profile for one user, optionally including MFA methods and sign-in activity.

tools.name: create_user
tools.description: Create a new Entra ID user. Requires confirmation before execution.

password.description: Initial password for the new account.

force_change_password.description: Require password change at next sign-in (default true).

account_enabled.description: Whether the account is enabled (default true).

usage_location.description: Two-letter usage location, required before assigning licenses (e.g., 'US').

license_sku_id.description: Optional license SKU id to assign to the new user.

tools.name: update_user
tools.description: Update properties of an existing user. Requires confirmation before execution.

updates.description: Map of properties to change. Supported keys: displayName, givenName, surname, jobTitle, department, companyName, officeLocation, mobilePhone, usageLocation, accountEnabled.

tools.name: delete_user
tools.description: Soft-delete a user (recoverable for 30 days). Requires confirmation before execution.

tools.name: reset_password
tools.description: Reset a user's password. If no password is supplied, a secure one is generated. Requires confirmation.

new_password.description: Optional explicit password. If omitted, a secure one is generated.

force_change_at_next_sign_in.description: Require password change at next sign-in (default true).

tools.name: enforce_mfa
tools.description: Enforce or relax MFA for a user via group-based Conditional Access (Microsoft-recommended). Adds/removes the user from the MFA-required security group that a Conditional Access policy targets. Requires confirmation before execution.

method.description: Enforcement method. 'conditional_access' (default) manages MFA-group membership. 'conditional_access_recommendation' returns setup guidance only. 'per_user_mfa' is legacy and not supported (returns an honest not-implemented result).

mfa_state.description: Direction of the change. 'enforced'/'enabled' add the user to the MFA group; 'disabled' removes them. Default 'enforced'.

tools.name: list_available_licenses
tools.description: List the tenant's license SKUs with total/consumed/available counts.

include_disabled.description: Include SKUs with no available units (default false).

tools.name: assign_license
tools.description: Assign a license SKU to a user. Requires confirmation before execution.

disabled_plans.description: Optional list of service plan ids to disable within the SKU.

tools.name: remove_license
tools.description: Remove a license SKU from a user. Requires confirmation before execution.

tools.name: manage_group_membership
tools.description: Add or remove a user from a group. Requires confirmation before execution.

tools.name: manage_shared_mailbox
tools.description: Manage a shared mailbox. Requires confirmation before execution.

action.description: Action to perform (e.g., create, add_member, remove_member, list_members).

tools.name: manage_distribution_group
tools.description: Manage a distribution group. Requires confirmation before execution.

action.description: Action to perform (e.g., create, add_member, remove_member, list_members).

tools.name: check_mailbox_status
tools.description: Check a user's mailbox provisioning, storage, forwarding, and delegation status.

tools.name: generate_weekly_insights_report
tools.description: Run the security checks and compile the weekly insights report.

checks.description: Optional subset of check keys to run (defaults to all).

lookback_days.description: Lookback window for sign-in based checks (default 7).

dormant_threshold_days.description: Inactivity threshold for the dormant-accounts check (default 90).

tools.name: send_report_to_teams
tools.description: Generate the security report and deliver it to the current Teams conversation. Requires confirmation.

tools.name: send_report_via_email
tools.description: Email the security report to recipients. Requires confirmation before execution.

tools.name: get_audit_log
tools.description: Query the M365 Guardian action audit log with optional filters.

start_date.description: ISO-8601 start of the time range.

end_date.description: ISO-8601 end of the time range.

top.description: Maximum number of entries to return (default 25).

tools.name: bulk_operation
tools.description: Run an operation across many users. Requires confirmation before execution.

operation.description: Operation to apply to each user.

user_ids.description: User ids or UPNs to operate on.

parameters.description: Operation parameters, e.g., {"sku_id": "..."} for license operations.
